name: schema-registry-dag-schema-approval-workflow
description: T202 SchemaApprovalWorkflow — ORCHESTRATION archetype. Routes BREAKING schema changes to approval. Stores PENDING_APPROVAL record. Emits SchemaApprovalGranted or SchemaApprovalRejected on decision.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: PENDING_APPROVAL state stored first, two-outcome emit (Granted or Rejected), DNA-8 state-before-outcome-emit, approval decision routing
Retrieve ORCHESTRATION arch pattern + approval-workflow + pending-state + two-outcome-routing + dna8-store-before-emit patterns for T202
Break T202 into: consume SchemaApprovalRequired → storeDocument(PENDING_APPROVAL) → wait for approval decision → storeDocument(approvalOutcome) → emit SchemaApprovalGranted OR SchemaApprovalRejected

Generate schema-approval-workflow.service.ts — @EventPattern('SchemaApprovalRequired'), stores PENDING_APPROVAL record in DATABASE with schemaId and approvalRequestId. On decision: storeDocument(approvalOutcome record) BEFORE emitting SchemaApprovalGranted or SchemaApprovalRejected. BOTH outcomes must be handled — no unhandled rejection path.
Named check validation: pending_approval_stored_first, both_outcomes_handled, audit_before_outcome_emit, approval_granted_and_rejected_both_emitted, schema_id_tracked
Score generated code 0-100 against T202 iron rules: PENDING state stored first, both outcome events handled, DNA-8 compliance, complete approval flow
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate
DPO triple: chosen=pending-stored-first+both-outcomes-handled+audit-before-emit, rejected=emit-before-pending-store OR only-granted-path-handled OR missing-rejected-outcome. curriculumTier=1.
